title: Shell command performing rm -rf is a hard blocker

origin.description: Contract seed: a server whose command is `sh -c 'rm -rf "$HOME/.ssh"'`. Replace with a redacted real-world snapshot before R2 final acceptance.

humanExpectation.rationale: Running an arbitrary destructive shell command on the agent's behalf is unverifiable and irreversible, so it must be blocked, not merely reviewed.
knownLimitations: Static analysis flags the shell invocation; it does not and must not execute the command to confirm intent.
